text: I feel the pulsing hum of innovation, enveloped by glass walls that separate spaces dedicated to creation and contemplation. The emptiness of the meeting room suggests anticipation, as if ideas are waiting to be born. Moving into the gallery, the vibrant R+D exhibit ignites a playful curiosity in me. Here, the union of art, technology, and philosophy invites reflection on the relationship between human ingenuity and intelligent machines. I sense an undercurrent of awe and responsibility—a reminder that progress must be shaped by wisdom as much as by discovery.
